summary: ThreeDScene: cone (upper+lower) + tilted slicing plane + two Dandelin spheres (tangent to both). RED dots mark the tangent points (foci F₁, F₂). ValueTracker θ moves a yellow point P around the slicing ellipse; orange/green PF₁ and PF₂ segments redraw via always_redraw. Right corner has live |PF₁| + |PF₂| staying ≈ constant.
